strategy_note: Private KickTipp round context. Do not optimize generic football accuracy; optimize points, leverage, and rank against friends.

players.name: TippKickN
notes: Previous pattern was too correlated with favorite-ish LLM outputs.
Use controlled attack until deficit or remaining matches force desperation.

players.name: Toegamorf
notes: Treat as the most dangerous opponent until real pick history says otherwise.
Model with stronger draw awareness than the public field.

players.name: UnsPascha
notes: Known to use expressive high scores. Do not chase the chaos unless slate state demands it.

players.name: Schirifötze
notes: Willing to take non-obvious away/team outcomes. Avoid pure favorite chalk correlation.

fill_in_next: Add friend screenshots as known_picks when visible: player, event_id or match, tip, is_leader.
Add completed tips to round_history: player, match, tip, actual, points, spieltag, favorite if known.
